summary: Backend testing for flag questions expansion (108 total: 78 Type A flag->name + 30 Type B name->flag). Verified data structure integrity, HTTP validity of a random sample of 25 flag URLs (w320 + w160), and end-to-end serialization of both question types through the /api/rooms/{code}/state endpoint during real duels.
passed: image_questions.py imports cleanly; IMAGE_QUESTIONS['capitals'] has exactly 108 entries (78 Type A with 'img', 30 Type B with 'opts_img')
All 108 questions have valid structure: opts length 4, a in [0,3], every question has either 'img' or 'opts_img' (opts_img length 4 when present)
Random sample of 25 flag URLs (mix of https://flagcdn.com/w320/*.png and https://flagcdn.com/w160/*.png) all returned HTTP 200 with content-type image/png
GET /api/rooms/{code}/state serves duel.question with 'img' for Type A questions and 'opts_img' (4 URLs) for Type B questions; observed both types across 33 duels in a single game
Public question payload correctly hides the answer field 'a' (only q, opts, and img/opts_img exposed)
Example Type B captured: 'أي هذه الأعلام هو علم المغرب؟' with opts_img [iq, ir, ma, so].png and Type A captured: 'لأي دولة هذا العلم؟' with img w320/ca.png
